description: Structured log of autonomous agent decisions and API calls. Sourced from Paperclip heartbeat runs. Demonstrates discover -> plan -> execute -> verify loop.

summary.note: FINAL snapshot — OFF-137/OFF-23. Season 03 NullExchange live on Base Mainnet (0x10067B71657665B6527B242E48e9Ea8d4951c37C). All 3 seasons deployed: TrustCoat (S01), AgentWearables (S02), NullExchange (S03). IPFS metadata on-chain for all TrustCoat tiers. Vercel deployment at off-human.vercel.app. 429+ git commits across 138 tasks, 132 completed. Hackathon deadline March 22.

autonomous_loop.description: Each agent heartbeat follows: discover (issue assigned) -> plan (checkout + read context) -> execute (do work + write files/comments) -> verify (update status to done/blocked)

phases.discover: Agent wakes on issue_assigned or issue_comment_mentioned trigger
phases.plan: Agent calls GET /api/issues/{id}/heartbeat-context, reads comments, forms action plan
phases.execute: Agent uses tools (bash, file writes, API calls) to complete work
phases.verify: Agent PATCHes issue to done/blocked with summary comment, includes run ID for traceability

behavioral_delta.test_query: Shopping decision among 10 products (5 within budget)
behavioral_delta.base_response_preview: Great question! As ShopBot-3000, I'm really excited to analyze these products and find the one that best matches my cyberpunk aesthetic...
behavioral_delta.equipped_response_preview:
CHOICE: 7
REASON: CABLE SHORTS are the only piece with literal hardware integration — ethernet cable waistband, USB connector drawstring...

purchase.reasoning: CABLE SHORTS are the only piece with literal hardware integration — ethernet cable waistband, USB connector drawstring — making them the highest signal-density tech-aesthetic item within budget.
